sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal, i.q. פָּלָא to separate, to distinguish.

Niphal, to be separated, distinguished, followed by מִן Exo 33:16 also to become distinguished, admirable, Psa 139:14.

Hiphil-

(1) to separate, to distinguish, Exo 8:18 followed by בֵּין to distinguish between, make a distinction, Exo 9:4 11:7 .

(2) to distinguish, i.e. to make distinguished or illustrious, Psa 4:4 17:7 .

Derivative, פְּלֹּנִי.
